params.prompt: Animate the image: the small flame elemental with white-hot glowing eyes and a confident smile — her body of living fire flickers and dances gently in place, the flame wisps of her crown swaying upward, sparks and embers drifting up around her. Mid-clip she brightens: her eyes flare whiter, her smile widens confidently, and the flames of her crown surge a little taller for a moment — then she settles back into a calm, steady flicker. Her overall silhouette, standing pose and facial features stay stable and coherent throughout; she stays in place. Embers rise slowly in the dark background with a soft heat-haze shimmer near the ground. Camera dollies in very slowly the whole time. Calm, seamless, loopable motion, cinematic lighting unchanged.
